description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named generate bundles that triggers on push events. The workflow has two jobs: build-win and publish_packages. The build-win job runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for x64 architecture and AI readiness. It checks out the repository, sets up the environment, and prepares for building Windows packages. The publish_packages job depends on build-win, runs on windows-latest, and currently only outputs a test message.
